overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character in a hat and coat walking through a grassy prairie at night, descending into a rocky ravine. The footage features high-quality game engine graphics with atmospheric blue-purple night lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy prairie hill at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the grassy hill toward the distant tree line and rock outcrop

entered.detail: rolling green grass covering the hillside
dark silhouette of pine trees on the horizon
large light-colored rock outcrop at the top of the hill

segments.scene_description: The character walks up a grassy hill under a clear night sky. The terrain is open prairie with sparse vegetation, leading toward a cluster of trees and a prominent rock formation in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky ravine entrance with large boulders

events.description: character transitions from grassy terrain into rocky ravine area with large stone formations

agents.ego_description: carefully descending into the rocky gully, navigating between large boulders and rock walls

entered.detail: rough rocky ground with scattered stones and gravel
tall light-colored rock walls forming the ravine sides
wooden utility pole with crossbar visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the grassy hill and enters a rocky ravine, descending between large white rock formations. A wooden utility pole becomes visible on the left as the terrain transitions to a narrow dirt path between stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky ravine passage with steep walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow rocky passage toward the distant valley opening visible ahead

entered.detail: distant opening where the ravine exits to the valley beyond

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a narrow enclosed ravine with steep rock walls on both sides. The path leads toward a distant opening where the valley is visible, while the utility pole recedes into the background on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from an open, moonlit prairie into the depths of a narrow rocky ravine. It begins with the character ascending a grassy hill under a clear night sky, moving across sparse vegetation toward distant trees and a prominent rock formation. As the character leaves the hillside, the terrain shifts into a descent between large white rock formations where a wooden utility pole appears on the left. The scene then tightens as the path transforms into a narrow dirt trail enclosed by steep stone walls on both sides. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the ravine, leaving the utility pole behind while heading toward a distant opening that reveals the wider valley.
